title: Arriving in Amsterdam without an address yet
summary: Prioritise tracking address-dependent tasks, short-term housing plan, and banking prep once you have an address.
firstWeekHighlights: Track which tasks must wait for a stable address
Prepare registration documents for when you have an address
firstMonthHighlights: Complete registration and receive BSN once you have an address

title: Arriving with a partner and temporary housing
summary: Focus on coordinated admin ownership, registration readiness, and banking once you have an address.
firstWeekHighlights: Confirm move-in date and mail access
Book or prepare municipality registration as soon as your address is active
firstMonthHighlights: Confirm next housing decision date if temporary

title: Family arriving and needing banking soon
summary: With housing in place, prioritise registration, BSN, banking and family-related admin.
firstWeekHighlights: Prepare registration documents for the whole household
Complete municipality registration and receive BSN
firstMonthHighlights: Review childcare, school and family registration follow-up

title: Solo expat already in the Netherlands and catching up on admin
summary: Use a practical catch-up sequence so registration and follow-ups become manageable week by week.
firstWeekHighlights: Confirm move-in date and mail access
Receive BSN and note which steps depend on it

title: Regional EU mover arriving with housing already arranged
summary: With housing arranged, focus on registration, BSN and first-month stabilisation.
firstWeekHighlights: Complete municipality registration and receive BSN
